name: Mahana Natsui
description: A friend of Orihime Inoue and Tatsuki Arisawa. She has curly brown hair, and she often doesn't know what she's talking about, which sometimes causes embarrassment to her friends. She has a tendency to be curious, which is shown when all the girls are having lunch. She asked Rukia Kuchiki if she had any romantic feelings for Ichigo Kurosaki, a statement Rukia denies. She is currently asleep with the rest of Karakura town in the Soul Society.
